events.title_en: A fuel storage at Kuwait International Airport was hit by Iranian drones, causing a major fire. [ 595 ]
Israel reports 4 missile barrages fired from Iran, with impacts of cluster munition reported from Bnei Brak and Tel Aviv, injuring 14 people. [ 596 ]
IDF reported a missile launched by Houthi militias was intercepted. [ 596 ]
Several waves of drones targeted a factory which produced motor oils in Erbil Iraq, causing a major fire. [ 597 ]

A claim by Donald Trump that the Iranian president asked for a ceasefire was rejected by Iran as "false and baseless". [ 600 ]
Two US MQ-9 Reaper drones were shot down by Iran near Isfahan , bringing the total number of MQ-9s lost during the war to 16. [ 601 ] [ 602 ]

Iranian drones hit the Mina Al-Ahmadi refinery in Kuwait and set it on fire in multiple locations. [ 622 ]
Explosions were reported in many places across Iran, including Alborz, Bushehr, Fars, Isfahan, Khuzestan, and Tehran. [ 623 ]
Kuwait authorities reported Iranian drones damaged a desalination plant. [ 624 ]
Abu Dhabi media office reported debris from an interception caused a fire in the Habshan gas facility. [ 624 ]
